sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 18:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 18:1
items.html: When the disparity of form is so great that it reaches oppositeness of form, from one end to the other, it is called “completely distant.”
